formats.notes: No bans. Intended as a free-for-all format above Ubers.

formats.banned_pokemon: Arceus, Eternatus, Calyrex-Shadow, Calyrex-Ice, Zacian-Crowned, Zamazenta-Crowned, Kyogre, Groudon, Rayquaza, Mewtwo, Mew, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Reshiram, Zekrom, Kyurem-White, Kyurem-Black, Xerneas, Yveltal, Zygarde, Solgaleo, Lunala, Necrozma-DM, Necrozma-DW, Marshadow, Zeraora, Zacian, Zamazenta, Urshifu-SS, Urshifu-RS, Regieleki, Regidrago, Glastrier, Spectrier, Enamorus
formats.notes: Catchall for Pokémon banned from OU. Suspect: Tera Blast under Round 18 testing (April 2026).

formats.banned_pokemon: All Ubers-tier Pokemon + Flutter Mane, Palafin-Hero, Chi-Yu, Chien-Pao, Iron Bundle, Koraidon, Miraidon, Walking Wake, Iron Leaves, Gouging Fire, Raging Bolt (previously banned then suspect resolved)
formats.banned_moves: Baton Pass (complex ban on passing stat boosts)
formats.notes: Main competitive format. Top usage April 2026: Great Tusk 35.26%, Kingambit 24.69%, Gholdengo 22.27%, Dragonite 20.99%, Zamazenta 20.08%, Ogerpon-Wellspring 17.85%, Iron Valiant 17.07%, Raging Bolt 15.06%, Dragapult 14.89%, Ting-Lu 14.81%

formats.banned_pokemon: All OU/Ubers Pokemon + Cyclizar, Roaring Moon, Enamorus-Therian, Sandy Shocks, Iron Moth, Ursaluna, Cresselia (UU banned), Slowking-Galar (dropped to UU April 2026)
formats.notes: April 2026 rises: Hydreigon, Mamoswine, Mew, Talonflame
April 2026: Necrozma, Terrakion, Barraskewda, Toxtricity newly placed here
April 2026: Arcanine, Uxie rose from PU to NU
April 2026 drops: Scrafty, Slowbro-Galar, Vileplume, Wo-Chien. Heracross unbanned.
Lowest Smogon tier. April 2026: Skuntank dropped here.

formats.banned_pokemon: Pokémon that cannot evolve or were not obtained unevolved; LC bans: Chinchou, Drifloon, Elekid, Gligar, Meditite, Misdreavus, Murkrow, Rufflet, Scyther, Sneasel, Swirlix, Tangela, Yanma, Cutiefly, Vulpix-Alola, Porygon, Pawniard
formats.banned_moves: Dragon Rage, Sonic Boom (fixed damage), Baton Pass
formats.notes: Only unevolved Pokémon at Lv 5. Has own ban list separate from OU.

formats.banned_pokemon: Mirrors standard OU bans but allows non-SV-native Pokemon from prior gens via National Dex
formats.notes: Allows Mega Evolution, Z-Moves stripped out. Popular alternative format.

formats.banned_pokemon: All Mythicals (Mew, Jirachi, Deoxys, Phione, Manaphy, Darkrai, Shaymin, Arceus, Victini, Keldeo, Meloetta, Genesect, Diancie, Hoopa, Volcanion, Magearna, Marshadow, Zeraora, Meltan, Melmetal, Zarude, Glastrier, Spectrier, Calyrex-fused forms, Pecharunt)
formats.restricted_pokemon: Calyrex-Ice, Calyrex-Shadow, Zacian, Zamazenta, Eternatus, Kubfu, Urshifu, Regieleki, Regidrago, Glastrier, Spectrier, Calyrex, Mewtwo, Lugia, Ho-Oh, Kyogre, Groudon, Rayquaza, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Reshiram, Zekrom, Kyurem, Xerneas, Yveltal, Zygarde, Cosmog, Cosmoem, Solgaleo, Lunala, Necrozma, Zacian, Zamazenta, Eternatus, Miraidon, Koraidon, Terapagos
formats.notes: 1 restricted max. The go-to World Championships format for first half of 2025.

formats.banned_pokemon: Mew, Jirachi, Deoxys, Phione, Manaphy, Darkrai, Shaymin, Arceus, Victini, Keldeo, Meloetta, Genesect, Diancie, Hoopa, Volcanion, Magearna, Marshadow, Zeraora, Meltan, Melmetal, Zarude, Pecharunt
formats.restricted_pokemon: Calyrex-Ice, Calyrex-Shadow, Zacian, Zamazenta, Eternatus, Kubfu, Urshifu (as restricted), Regieleki, Regidrago, Glastrier, Spectrier, Mewtwo, Lugia, Ho-Oh, Kyogre, Groudon, Rayquaza, Dialga, Palkia, Giratina, Reshiram, Zekrom, Kyurem, Xerneas, Yveltal, Zygarde, Cosmog, Cosmoem, Solgaleo, Lunala, Necrozma, Miraidon, Koraidon, Terapagos
formats.notes: Current active format (Jan 5 2026+). 2 restricted max. Used for 2025 World Championships. Urshifu NOT restricted in this reg.

formats.restricted_pokemon: Same as Reg I restricted list + Mythicals now allowed (but do not count as restricted)
formats.notes: First regulation to allow Mythicals. Ranked Battles only — NOT used at official TPCi tournaments. Active only Sep 2025 – Jan 4 2026.
